hero.heading: Modern primary care,
hero.subhead: Thoughtful primary care for adults — preventive, proactive, and personal. The everyday care you need, close to home.

services.title: Annual Physicals & Wellness
services.body: Comprehensive yearly exams that go beyond a checklist — bloodwork, screenings, and a real conversation about what matters most to you.
services.detail: Includes age-appropriate cancer screenings, cardiovascular risk assessment, immunizations, and a personalized wellness plan.

services.title: Chronic Condition Management
services.body: Hypertension, diabetes, thyroid, cholesterol — managed proactively with a doctor who knows your history.
services.detail: Coordinated care plans, regular monitoring, and a clear path back to the practice when things change.

services.title: Timely Care When You Need It
services.body: We make every effort to accommodate same-day sick visits for urgent concerns. When our schedule is full, virtual care keeps you covered.
services.detail: Call or message us in the morning. If a same-day slot isn't available, we'll route you to virtual care for prompt attention.

services.title: Women's & Men's Health
services.body: Annual exams, hormone health, perimenopause care, men's wellness — handled with care, not a checklist.
services.detail: From preventive screenings to hormone and perimenopause questions, we approach gender-specific care with depth and respect.

services.title: Preventive Screenings & Labs
services.body: Bloodwork and modern screening protocols ordered on your behalf, built around your stage of life.
services.detail: We coordinate colonoscopies, mammograms, DEXA scans, and other referrals — so you don't have to manage it all yourself.

services.title: Lifestyle & Wellness Guidance
services.body: Practical guidance on weight, nutrition, sleep, and stress — woven into your regular care, not sold as a separate program.
services.detail: Routine vaccinations and down-to-earth lifestyle counseling — support for everyday goals like better sleep, steady weight, and more energy.

approach.heading: What to expect at your
approach.body: Your first appointment is longer than you might expect. We want to understand your history, your goals, and what matters most to you — not just your vitals.
approach.pullQuote: Prompt callbacks. Visits that don't make you wait weeks. A doctor who remembers your last conversation — and your story.

cta.heading: Not sure where to start?
cta.subhead: Book an appointment and we'll figure out the right starting point for you together.
